title: DMOW-056 Penis Sommelier Ayumu Sena - Ayumu Sena (Aiko Hirose)
overview: She chose this job because she loves Ji-Po so much that she is given the title of "Ochi-Po Sommelier". "Ah...Let me taste more..." Firmness, angle, smell, potency, balls... A horny woman who travels around the world is said to give the highest rating to a Japanese boy! With a blissful expression surrounded by Ji Po, she sucks the meat sticks one after another while enjoying the rich throat of semen! [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
